---
title: "Assignments"
---

Each week has a short set of readings and an AI tutor assignment. The AI tutor assignment is completed on the [course AI tutor site](#) — link and instructions TBD.

---

## Week 1 (Mar 24–26): The Basics of Economics

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 1 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, Mar 29 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 2 (Mar 31–Apr 2): Causation & Experiments

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 2 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, Apr 5 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 3 (Apr 7–9): Education & Discrimination

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 3 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, Apr 12 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 4 (Apr 14–16): Scaling & Partnerships

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 4 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, Apr 19 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 5 (Apr 21–23): Midterm & Incentives

**Readings**

- Reading TBD

*No AI tutor assignment this week.*

---

## Week 6 (Apr 28–30): Markets & Equity

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 6 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, May 3 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 7 (May 5–7): Uncertainty & Quasi-Experiments

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 7 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, May 10 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 8 (May 12–14): Risk, Insurance & Labor

**Readings**

- Reading TBD
- Reading TBD

**AI Tutor Assignment**

Complete the Week 8 module on the course AI tutor site by **Sunday, May 17 at 11:59pm**.

---

## Week 9 (May 19–21): Technology, AI & Midterm

**Readings**

- Reading TBD

*No AI tutor assignment this week.*
